name: linSlFSMSetStEnd
title: linSlFSMSetStEnd
syntax: void linSlFSMSetStEnd(unsigned int slaveId, unsigned int stateId);
description: Ends the configuration of the state specified by stateId of the Slave with the identifier slaveId.
The entire configuration of a state must appear within a linSlFSMSetStBegin / linSlFSMSetStEnd pair.

parameters.name: slaveId
parameters.description: Identifier of the relevant Slave. Corresponds to the slaveId, that was defined with linSlSimulate.
